cards.title: Sketch onboarding flow
cards.details: Map the first-run board experience with clear empty states.

cards.title: Define launch checklist
cards.details: Capture the lean set of work needed before the MVP demo.

cards.title: Collect stakeholder notes
cards.details: Summarize feedback into crisp card titles and details.

cards.title: Refine card motion
cards.details: Make drag and drop feel quick, stable, and predictable.

cards.title: Write board copy
cards.details: Keep labels short enough to scan while the board is busy.

cards.title: Build column rename
cards.details: Support inline edits without adding settings screens.

cards.title: Polish add-card form
cards.details: Use direct controls that work smoothly on narrow screens.

cards.title: Review color contrast
cards.details: Check the required palette across headings and actions.

cards.title: Choose project stack
cards.details: Use Next.js, TypeScript, and a proven drag and drop library.

cards.title: Seed demo data
cards.details: Open directly to a credible board with realistic work.
